edibility: Edible; remove sticky cap cuticle and pore layer to avoid laxative effect; popular in Eastern Europe (maślaki)
taste: Mild, slightly slippery flesh; absorbs sauces well
search: Where/when to find — late summer/fall under pines, sticky brown cap, distinctive ring on stem, key look-alikes (other Suillus, all edible)

toxicity.symptoms: Mild GI upset if cap cuticle/pores eaten in quantity
